trees.description: Bestows passive and active buffs to allies including speed, damage, resistance, and healing.

skills.name: Bottled Sunlight
skills.depths_description: Right click while sneaking to throw a luminescent bottle. If you or an ally walk over it, you both gain #{8|10|12|14|16|20} absorption health for 30 seconds and the durations of negative potion effects get reduced by 10 seconds. If the bottle is destroyed or not grabbed, it quickly comes off cooldown. Cooldown: 30s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while sneaking to throw a luminescent bottle. If you or an ally walk over it, you both gain #{8|10|12|14|16|20} absorption health for 30 seconds and the durations of negative potion effects get reduced by 10 seconds. If the bottle is destroyed or not grabbed, it quickly comes off cooldown. Cooldown: 30s.

skills.name: Enlightenment
skills.depths_description: All players in your party gain #{30%|35%|40%|45%|50%|100%} more experience. Does not stack if multiple players in the party have the skill. Additionally, your chances of finding higher rarity abilities are increased by #{3%|4%|5%|6%|7%|30%}.
skills.zenith_description: All players in your party gain #{30%|35%|40%|45%|50%|100%} more experience. Does not stack if multiple players in the party have the skill. Additionally, your chances of finding higher rarity abilities are increased by #{3%|4%|5%|6%|7%|30%}.

skills.name: Lightning Bottle
skills.depths_description: For every 4 mobs that die within 32 blocks of you, gain 2 lightning bottles, which stack up to 12. Throwing a lightning bottle deals #{6|7.5|9|10.5|12|15} magic damage in a 4 block radius and applies 20% slowness and #{10%|13%|16%|19%|22%|28%} vulnerability for 3 seconds.
skills.zenith_description: For every 4 mobs that die within 32 blocks of you, gain 2 lightning bottles, which stack up to 12. Throwing a lightning bottle deals #{9|11.25|13.5|15.75|18|22.5} magic damage in a 4 block radius and applies 20% slowness and #{10%|13%|16%|19%|22%|28%} vulnerability for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Radiant Blessing
skills.depths_description: Left click while sneaking to enchant players within 18 blocks, including yourself, with 20% resistance and #{12%|16%|20%|24%|28%|36%} increased damage for 10 seconds. Cooldown: 22s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking to enchant players within 18 blocks, including yourself, with 20% resistance and #{12%|16%|20%|24%|28%|36%} increased damage for 10 seconds. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.name: Rejuvenation
skills.depths_description: All players within 12 blocks of you (including yourself) heal 5% of their max health every #{5|4.5|4|3.5|3|2.5} seconds. A given player will only be healed by the highest Rejuvenation that affects them.
skills.zenith_description: All players within 12 blocks of you (including yourself) heal 5% of their max health every #{5|4.5|4|3.5|3|2.5} seconds. A given player will only be healed by the highest Rejuvenation that affects them.

skills.name: Soothing Combos
skills.depths_description: Every 3 melee strikes, heal all players within 6 blocks for #{6%|7%|8%|9%|10%|12%} of their max health. Other players receive 50% more healing. Additionally, give #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|25%} speed and Haste #{I|I|I|I|I|II} for 6 seconds to all players within 12 blocks.
skills.zenith_description: Every 3 melee strikes, heal all players within 6 blocks for #{6%|7%|8%|9%|10%|12%} of their max health. Other players receive 50% more healing. Additionally, give #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|25%} speed and Haste #{I|I|I|I|I|II} for 6 seconds to all players within 12 blocks.

skills.name: Sundrops
skills.depths_description: Whenever a player in your party breaks a spawner, there is a #{20%|25%|30%|35%|40%|60%} chance of spawning a sundrop that lasts 10 seconds. Picking up a sundrop gives 20% speed and 15% resistance for 8 seconds. Spawn chance stacks with other players in your party who have the skill, up to 100%.
skills.zenith_description: Whenever a player in your party breaks a spawner, there is a #{20%|25%|30%|35%|40%|60%} chance of spawning a sundrop that lasts 10 seconds. Picking up a sundrop gives 20% speed and 15% resistance for 8 seconds. Spawn chance stacks with other players in your party who have the skill, up to 100%.

skills.name: Ward of Light
skills.depths_description: Right click while not sneaking to heal nearby players within 12 blocks in front of you for #{32%|40%|48%|56%|64%|100%} of their max health. Cooldown: 12s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking to heal nearby players within 12 blocks in front of you for #{32%|40%|48%|56%|64%|100%} of their max health. Cooldown: 12s.

skills.name: Divine Beam
skills.depths_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking instead shoots a beam of light, healing players hit for #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|120%} of their max health and stunning non-Elite mobs hit for #{1|1.1|1.2|1.3|1.5|2} seconds. Elites are stunned for half the duration instead. Healing is increased by 20% and stun duration is increased by 0.25s per player or mob hit, up to 4 targets. Excess healing is converted to absorption, up to 4, that lasts for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 16s.
skills.zenith_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking instead shoots a beam of light, healing players hit for #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|120%} of their max health and stunning non-Elite mobs hit for #{1|1.1|1.2|1.3|1.5|2} seconds. Elites are stunned for half the duration instead. Healing is increased by 20% and stun duration is increased by 0.25s per player or mob hit, up to 4 targets. Excess healing is converted to absorption, up to 4, that lasts for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 16s.

skills.name: Eternal Savior
skills.depths_description: When your health drops below 20%, enter stasis for 5 seconds. During this time, rapidly heal all other players within 5 blocks for #{60%|75%|90%|105%|120%|150%} of their max health over the full duration and begin reviving all nearby graves. Nearby mobs deal 80% less damage while they are nearby and for 2 seconds afterwards. When stasis ends, give #{4|5|6|7|8|10} absorption to all players within 5 blocks for 5 seconds and stun nearby mobs for 1 second. Cooldown: 120s.
skills.zenith_description: When your health drops below 20%, enter stasis for 5 seconds. During this time, rapidly heal all other players within 5 blocks for #{60%|75%|90%|105%|120%|150%} of their max health over the full duration and begin reviving all nearby graves. Nearby mobs deal 80% less damage while they are nearby and for 2 seconds afterwards. When stasis ends, give #{4|5|6|7|8|10} absorption to all players within 5 blocks for 5 seconds and stun nearby mobs for 1 second. Cooldown: 120s.

skills.name: Spark of Inspiration
skills.depths_description: Press key.swapOffhand while looking at a player within 16 blocks to instantly heal both of you for 100% of your max HP and empower both of you for the next #{5|5.5|6|6.5|7|8} seconds, giving them #{+60%|+75%|+90%|+105%|+120%|+150%} faster cooldown recharge rate, while you gain #{15%|20%|25%|30%|35%|45%} Strength. If either player's health drops below 30% during this time, the effect immediately ends for both players and both are granted 100% Resistance for 1s. If there are no other players in your party, you may activate this ability on yourself instead. Cooldown: 40s.
skills.zenith_description: Press key.swapOffhand while looking at a player within 16 blocks to instantly heal both of you for 100% of your max HP and empower both of you for the next #{5|5.5|6|6.5|7|8} seconds, giving them #{+60%|+75%|+90%|+105%|+120%|+150%} faster cooldown recharge rate, while you gain #{15%|20%|25%|30%|35%|45%} Strength. If either player's health drops below 30% during this time, the effect immediately ends for both players and both are granted 100% Resistance for 1s. If there are no other players in your party, you may activate this ability on yourself instead. Cooldown: 40s.

trees.description: Resolute tank with capabilities of taking aggro and granting resistance to self, armed with minor crowd control.

skills.name: Beast's Claw
skills.depths_description: Right click while not sneaking to unleash a devastating claw swipe in front of you, dealing #{8|10|12|14|16|24} melee damage to mobs in front of you within 4 blocks and stunning them for #{0.75|1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2.25} seconds. Cooldown: 8s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking to unleash a devastating claw swipe in front of you, dealing #{12|15|18|21|24|36} melee damage to mobs in front of you within 4 blocks and stunning them for #{0.75|1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2.25} seconds. Cooldown: 8s.

skills.name: Bramble Shell
skills.depths_description: Whenever an enemy deals melee or projectile damage to you, they take #{5|6|7|8|9|12} melee damage.
skills.zenith_description: Whenever an enemy deals melee or projectile damage to you, they take #{7.5|9|10.5|12|13.5|18} melee damage.

skills.name: Bulwark
skills.depths_description: You block the next melee attack that would have hit you, nullifying the damage. Cooldown: #{19|17|15|13|11|8}s.
skills.zenith_description: You block the next melee attack that would have hit you, nullifying the damage. Cooldown: #{19|17|15|13|11|8}s.

skills.name: Earthen Combos
skills.depths_description: Every 3 melee strikes, gain #{8%|10%|12%|14%|16%|20%} resistance for 4 seconds and roots the enemy for 1.25 seconds.
skills.zenith_description: Every 3 melee strikes, gain #{8%|10%|12%|14%|16%|20%} resistance for 4 seconds and roots the enemy for 1.25 seconds.

skills.name: Earthen Wrath
skills.depths_description: Press key.swapOffhand to redirect all damage allies in a 20 block radius take from mobs (excluding percent health damage) to you at a #{35%|37.5%|40%|42.5%|45%|50%} damage reduction for 6 seconds, then deal #{80%|100%|120%|140%|160%|200%} of the original damage absorbed as melee damage in a 6 block radius, with a cap of 160 damage. Cooldown begins after the effect ends. Cooldown: 24s.
skills.zenith_description: Press key.swapOffhand to redirect all damage allies in a 20 block radius take from mobs (excluding percent health damage) to you at a #{35%|37.5%|40%|42.5%|45%|50%} damage reduction for 6 seconds, then deal #{80%|100%|120%|140%|160%|200%} of the original damage absorbed as melee damage in a 6 block radius, with a cap of 240 damage. Cooldown begins after the effect ends. Cooldown: 24s.

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.depths_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking causes an earthquake 1 second after impact. The earthquake deals #{20|25|30|35|40|50} magic damage to mobs in a 4 block radius, silencing them for #{4|4.5|5|5.5|6|7} seconds and knocking them upward. Cooldown: 16s.
skills.zenith_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking causes an earthquake 1 second after impact. The earthquake deals #{30|37.5|45|52.5|60|75} magic damage to mobs in a 4 block radius, silencing them for #{4|4.5|5|5.5|6|7} seconds and knocking them upward. Cooldown: 16s.

skills.name: Entrench
skills.depths_description: Blocking with a shield or absorption roots mobs within 6 blocks for #{1.5|1.75|2|2.25|2.5|3.5} seconds. The next melee hit against a rooted mob will knock them back. Cooldown: 18s.
skills.zenith_description: Blocking with a shield or absorption roots mobs within 6 blocks for #{1.5|1.75|2|2.25|2.5|3.5} seconds. The next melee hit against a rooted mob will knock them back. Cooldown: 18s.

skills.name: Iron Grip
skills.depths_description: Right click while sneaking to rupture a 4 block area up to 20 blocks away. You and players hit by the rupture gain #{15%|18%|22%|26%|30%|40%} Resistance for 5 seconds. Mobs hit by the rupture take #{12|14|16|18|20|24} melee damage, are teleported to you (Bosses and CC immune mobs are immune), taunted, and rooted for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 12s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while sneaking to rupture a 4 block area up to 20 blocks away. You and players hit by the rupture gain #{15%|18%|22%|26%|30%|40%} Resistance for 5 seconds. Mobs hit by the rupture take #{18|21|24|27|30|36} melee damage, are teleported to you (Bosses and CC immune mobs are immune), taunted, and rooted for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 12s.

skills.name: Taunt
skills.depths_description: Left click while sneaking to force all enemies within 12 blocks to target you, and you gain #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|2.5} absorption for every enemy (up to 6 enemies) afflicted, for 8 seconds. Passively, you deal an additional #{6|7.5|9|10.5|12|15} melee damage on critical strikes to mobs that are targeting you or stunned. Cooldown: 18s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking to force all enemies within 12 blocks to target you, and you gain #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|2.5} absorption for every enemy (up to 6 enemies) afflicted, for 8 seconds. Passively, you deal an additional #{9|11.25|13.5|15.75|18|22.5} melee damage on critical strikes to mobs that are targeting you or stunned. Cooldown: 18s.

trees.description: Caster of strong burst AOE abilities and potent damage over time.

skills.name: Apocalypse
skills.depths_description: When your health drops below 25%, ignore the hit and instead deal #{40|50|60|70|80|100} magic damage in a 5 block radius. For each mob that is killed, heal 30% of your max health. Healing above your max health is converted into absorption, up to 25% of your max health that lasts 30 seconds. Cooldown: 75s.
skills.zenith_description: When your health drops below 25%, ignore the hit and instead deal #{60|75|90|105|120|150} magic damage in a 5 block radius. For each mob that is killed, heal 30% of your max health. Healing above your max health is converted into absorption, up to 25% of your max health that lasts 30 seconds. Cooldown: 75s.

skills.name: Detonation
skills.depths_description: When an enemy dies within 8 blocks of you, it explodes, dealing #{2|2.5|3|3.5|4|5} magic damage to other enemies within 2 blocks.
skills.zenith_description: When an enemy dies within 8 blocks of you, it explodes, dealing #{3|3.75|4.5|5.25|6|7.5} magic damage to other enemies within 2 blocks.

skills.name: Fireball
skills.depths_description: Right click while not sneaking to throw a fireball in the direction you are facing. When the fireball collides with a surface or enemy, it explodes, dealing #{11|13|15|17|19|23} magic damage and sets enemies ablaze for 3 seconds in a 3 block radius. Cooldown: 6s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking to throw a fireball in the direction you are facing. When the fireball collides with a surface or enemy, it explodes, dealing #{16.5|19.5|22.5|25.5|28.5|34.5} magic damage and sets enemies ablaze for 3 seconds in a 3 block radius. Cooldown: 6s.

skills.name: Flame Spirit
skills.depths_description: Damaging 3 or more enemies at once summons a spirit that deals #{2|2.5|3|3.5|4|5.5} magic damage in a 4 block radius every second for 6 seconds and sets affected mobs on fire for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 12s.
skills.zenith_description: Damaging 3 or more enemies at once summons a spirit that deals #{3|3.75|4.5|5.25|6|8.25} magic damage in a 4 block radius every second for 6 seconds and sets affected mobs on fire for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 12s.

skills.name: Flamestrike
skills.depths_description: Right click while sneaking to create a torrent of flames, dealing #{14|17|20|23|26|32} magic damage to all enemies in front of you within 7 blocks, setting them on fire for 4 seconds and knocking them away. Cooldown: 10s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while sneaking to create a torrent of flames, dealing #{21|25.5|30|34.5|39|48} magic damage to all enemies in front of you within 7 blocks, setting them on fire for 4 seconds and knocking them away. Cooldown: 10s.

skills.name: Primordial Mastery
skills.depths_description: Your abilities deal #{8%|12%|16%|20%|24%|32%} more damage.
skills.zenith_description: Your abilities deal #{8%|12%|16%|20%|24%|32%} more damage.

skills.name: Pyroblast
skills.depths_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking fires an exploding projectile, which deals #{20|24|28|32|36|44} magic damage to mobs within 4 blocks upon impact. Affected mobs are set on fire for 4 seconds. Cooldown: 12s.
skills.zenith_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking fires an exploding projectile, which deals #{30|36|42|48|54|66} magic damage to mobs within 4 blocks upon impact. Affected mobs are set on fire for 4 seconds. Cooldown: 12s.

skills.name: Pyromania
skills.depths_description: For every mob and player on fire (up to 6, total) within #{6|6|6|6|6|8} blocks of you, gain #{3%|4%|5%|6%|7.5%|10%} increased damage.
skills.zenith_description: For every mob and player on fire (up to 6, total) within #{6|6|6|6|6|8} blocks of you, gain #{3%|4%|5%|6%|7.5%|10%} increased damage.

skills.name: Volcanic Combos
skills.depths_description: When you melee attack an enemy, deal #{8|10|12|14|16|20} magic damage to enemies in a 4 block radius and set those enemies on fire for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 6s.
skills.zenith_description: When you melee attack an enemy, deal #{12|15|18|21|24|30} magic damage to enemies in a 4 block radius and set those enemies on fire for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 6s.

skills.name: Volcanic Meteor
skills.depths_description: Press key.swapOffhand to summon a falling meteor at the location where you are looking, up to 25 blocks away. When the meteor lands, it deals #{36|45|54|63|72|90} magic damage in a 5 block radius and applies fire for 3 seconds. The damage is reduced depending on the distance from the center. Cooldown: 25s.
skills.zenith_description: Press key.swapOffhand to summon a falling meteor at the location where you are looking, up to 25 blocks away. When the meteor lands, it deals #{54|67.5|81|94.5|108|135} magic damage in a 5 block radius and applies fire for 3 seconds. The damage is reduced depending on the distance from the center. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.name: Igneous Rune
skills.depths_description: Left click while sneaking to place a rune up to 30 blocks away. The rune has a radius of 3 blocks, arms after 2 seconds, and grants fire immunity to all players inside. A maximum of 1 rune can be active at a time. When a mob enters the rune once it arms, it erupts and deals #{20|24|28|32|36|44} magic damage to all mobs in a 6 block radius and ignites them for 6 seconds. After a rune is triggered, you gain 15% strength and 10% speed for 6 seconds.  Cooldown: 16s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking to place a rune up to 30 blocks away. The rune has a radius of 3 blocks, arms after 2 seconds, and grants fire immunity to all players inside. A maximum of 1 rune can be active at a time. When a mob enters the rune once it arms, it erupts and deals #{30|36|42|48|54|66} magic damage to all mobs in a 6 block radius and ignites them for 6 seconds. After a rune is triggered, you gain 15% strength and 10% speed for 6 seconds.  Cooldown: 16s.

trees.description: Manipulates the flow of combat by debuffing enemies with ice generating abilities and high damage potential.

skills.name: Avalanche
skills.depths_description: Press key.swapOffhand to begin shattering all ice blocks and snow within a radius of 8 blocks, dealing a total of #{28|35|42|49|56|70} magic damage in 4 pulses over 0.5s to enemies on frozen ground. The radius starts at 25% of the max value and grows with each pulse until it reaches 100%. Affected enemies are rooted for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 20s.
skills.zenith_description: Press key.swapOffhand to begin shattering all ice blocks and snow within a radius of 8 blocks, dealing a total of #{42|52.5|63|73.5|84|105} magic damage in 4 pulses over 0.5s to enemies on frozen ground. The radius starts at 25% of the max value and grows with each pulse until it reaches 100%. Affected enemies are rooted for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.name: Cryobox
skills.depths_description: When your health drops below 25%, gain #{10|12|14|16|18|22} absorption health for 12 seconds and encase yourself in a cage of ice for 12 seconds. Mobs within 4 blocks will be knocked back and frozen for 3 seconds. For the next 4 seconds, standing on frozen ground rapidly replenishes this absorption, restoring 8 absorption per second. Cooldown: 90s.
skills.zenith_description: When your health drops below 25%, gain #{10|12|14|16|18|22} absorption health for 12 seconds and encase yourself in a cage of ice for 12 seconds. Mobs within 4 blocks will be knocked back and frozen for 3 seconds. For the next 4 seconds, standing on frozen ground rapidly replenishes this absorption, restoring 8 absorption per second. Cooldown: 90s.

skills.name: Frigid Combos
skills.depths_description: When you melee attack an enemy, deal #{2|3|4|5|6|8} magic damage to mobs within 4 blocks and apply #{20%|25%|30%|35%|40%|50%} slowness to them for 2 seconds. If the mob was standing on frozen ground, shatter it and increase the damage to #{12|14|16|18|20|24} and the radius to 6 blocks instead. Cooldown: 6s.
skills.zenith_description: When you melee attack an enemy, deal #{3|4.5|6|7.5|9|12} magic damage to mobs within 4 blocks and apply #{20%|25%|30%|35%|40%|50%} slowness to them for 2 seconds. If the mob was standing on frozen ground, shatter it and increase the damage to #{18|21|24|27|30|36} and the radius to 6 blocks instead. Cooldown: 6s.

skills.name: Snowstorm
skills.depths_description: Left click while sneaking to summon a 5 block radius snowstorm that lasts for 8 seconds and slowly travels forwards, freezing the ground beneath it for 8 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, mobs in the storm take #{1.5|2|2.5|3|3.5|4.5} magic damage and are slowed by 15% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. Once a mob reaches 5 stacks, they take #{10|12.5|15|17.5|20|25} magic damage and are frozen for 2 seconds. (Bosses and CC immune mobs are immune.) Players in the storm are extinguished and receive 100% Knockback Resistance. Cooldown: 16s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking to summon a 5 block radius snowstorm that lasts for 8 seconds and slowly travels forwards, freezing the ground beneath it for 8 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, mobs in the storm take #{2.25|3|3.75|4.5|5.25|6.75} magic damage and are slowed by 15% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. Once a mob reaches 5 stacks, they take #{15|18.75|22.5|26.25|30|37.5} magic damage and are frozen for 2 seconds. (Bosses and CC immune mobs are immune.) Players in the storm are extinguished and receive 100% Knockback Resistance. Cooldown: 16s.

skills.name: Frozen Domain
skills.depths_description: When standing on ice or snow, gain #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|25%} speed and heal 5% of your max health every #{2|1.75|1.5|1.25|1|0.75}s. Effects last for 5 seconds after leaving the frozen ground. Standing on ice or snow also extinguishes you if you are on fire.
skills.zenith_description: When standing on ice or snow, gain #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|25%} speed and heal 5% of your max health every #{2|1.75|1.5|1.25|1|0.75}s. Effects last for 5 seconds after leaving the frozen ground. Standing on ice or snow also extinguishes you if you are on fire.

skills.name: Ice Barrier
skills.depths_description: Right click while sneaking to place an ice marker up to 30 blocks away. Placing a second marker within 5 seconds and within #{20|25|30|35|40|50} blocks of the first marker forms a wall of ice connecting the two points, lasting for 12 seconds. If there is a height difference of 4 or more blocks between the two markers, an ice staircase is placed instead. Deal #{15|18|21|24|27|33} magic damage to mobs near the ice when placed. Enemies that break the barrier are stunned for 2s. Cooldown is refunded if no second marker is placed. Cooldown: #{14|13|12|11|10|8}s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while sneaking to place an ice marker up to 30 blocks away. Placing a second marker within 5 seconds and within #{20|25|30|35|40|50} blocks of the first marker forms a wall of ice connecting the two points, lasting for 12 seconds. If there is a height difference of 4 or more blocks between the two markers, an ice staircase is placed instead. Deal #{22.5|27|31.5|36|40.5|49.5} magic damage to mobs near the ice when placed. Enemies that break the barrier are stunned for 2s. Cooldown is refunded if no second marker is placed. Cooldown: #{14|13|12|11|10|8}s.

skills.name: Icebreaker
skills.depths_description: Damage you deal is increased by #{20%|27%|33%|40%|46%|60%} if the mob is on frozen ground or #{10%|13.5%|16.5%|20%|23%|30%} if the mob is debuffed.
skills.zenith_description: Damage you deal is increased by #{20%|27%|33%|40%|46%|60%} if the mob is on frozen ground or #{10%|13.5%|16.5%|20%|23%|30%} if the mob is debuffed.

skills.name: Ice Lance
skills.depths_description: Right click while not sneaking to shoot an ice lance that travels for 8 blocks and pierces through mobs, dealing #{12.5|15|17.5|20|22.5|27.5} magic damage and applying 20% Slowness and Weaken for 2 seconds. Mobs hit by the lance have snow created under them that lasts for 6 seconds. The lance can pass through ice blocks. Cooldown: 6s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking to shoot an ice lance that travels for 8 blocks and pierces through mobs, dealing #{18.75|22.5|26.25|30|33.75|41.25} magic damage and applying 20% Slowness and Weaken for 2 seconds. Mobs hit by the lance have snow created under them that lasts for 6 seconds. The lance can pass through ice blocks. Cooldown: 6s.

skills.name: Permafrost
skills.depths_description: For every 3 mobs you kill, gain 1 charge, up to a maximum of 3. Left click while not sneaking to consume the charge, spawning snow in a 4 block cone for #{8|11|14|17|20|26} seconds and applies 20% slowness and #{10%|13%|16%|19%|22%|28%} vulnerability for 3 seconds. This vulnerability only applies to the caster.
skills.zenith_description: For every 3 mobs you kill, gain 1 charge, up to a maximum of 3. Left click while not sneaking to consume the charge, spawning snow in a 4 block cone for #{8|11|14|17|20|26} seconds and applies 20% slowness and #{10%|13%|16%|19%|22%|28%} vulnerability for 3 seconds. This vulnerability only applies to the caster.

skills.name: Piercing Cold
skills.depths_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking instead shoots an enchanted beam of frost that deals #{18|21|24|27|30|36} magic damage and leaves a trail of snow below it that lasts for 8 seconds. The beam can pass through ice blocks. Cooldown: 11s.
skills.zenith_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking instead shoots an enchanted beam of frost that deals #{27|31.5|36|40.5|45|54} magic damage and leaves a trail of snow below it that lasts for 8 seconds. The beam can pass through ice blocks. Cooldown: 11s.

trees.description: Skilled in single target melee damage, especially against bosses and elites.

skills.name: Advancing Shadows
skills.depths_description: Right click while not sneaking and looking at a hostile mob within 12 blocks to teleport to it and gain #{24%|30%|36%|42%|48%|60%} melee damage for 5 seconds. If you are holding a shield in your offhand, you will gain the damage buff but not be teleported. Cooldown: 18s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking and looking at a hostile mob within 12 blocks to teleport to it and gain #{24%|30%|36%|42%|48%|60%} melee damage for 5 seconds. If you are holding a shield in your offhand, you will gain the damage buff but not be teleported. Cooldown: 18s.

skills.name: Blade Flurry
skills.depths_description: Right click while sneaking to deal #{8|10|12|14|16|20} melee damage in a 4 block radius around you. Affected mobs are silenced for #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|2.5} seconds and knocked away slightly. Cooldown: 6s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while sneaking to deal #{12|15|18|21|24|30} melee damage in a 4 block radius around you. Affected mobs are silenced for #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|2.5} seconds and knocked away slightly. Cooldown: 6s.

skills.name: Brutalize
skills.depths_description: When you critically strike, you deal #{12%|15%|18%|21%|24%|30%} of the damage to all enemies (including the target) in a 2 block radius and knock other enemies away from the target.
skills.zenith_description: When you critically strike, you deal #{12%|15%|18%|21%|24%|30%} of the damage to all enemies (including the target) in a 2 block radius and knock other enemies away from the target.

skills.name: Chaos Dagger
skills.depths_description: Press key.swapOffhand to throw a cursed dagger that stuns an enemy for 3 seconds (does not stun bosses). The next time you deal non-ability melee or projectile damage within 5 seconds, you deal #{100%|125%|150%|175%|200%|250%} more damage multiplicatively. If this damage kills the target, gain stealth for 1.5 seconds. The dagger prioritizes nearby Elites and Bosses but can hit any mob in its path. Cooldown: 22s.
skills.zenith_description: Press key.swapOffhand to throw a cursed dagger that stuns an enemy for 3 seconds (does not stun bosses). The next time you deal non-ability melee or projectile damage within 5 seconds, you deal #{100%|125%|150%|175%|200%|250%} more damage multiplicatively. If this damage kills the target, gain stealth for 1.5 seconds. The dagger prioritizes nearby Elites and Bosses but can hit any mob in its path. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.name: Dark Combos
skills.depths_description: Every 3 melee attacks, apply #{14%|20%|26%|32%|38%|50%} vulnerability for 3 seconds.
skills.zenith_description: Every 3 melee attacks, apply #{14%|20%|26%|32%|38%|50%} vulnerability for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Deadly Strike
skills.depths_description: You deal #{10%|15%|20%|25%|30%|40%} more melee damage.
skills.zenith_description: You deal #{10%|15%|20%|25%|30%|40%} more melee damage.

skills.name: Dethroner
skills.depths_description: You deal #{14%|21%|28%|35%|42%|56%} more damage to elites and #{10%|15%|20%|25%|30%|40%} more damage to bosses.
skills.zenith_description: You deal #{14%|21%|28%|35%|42%|56%} more damage to elites and #{10%|15%|20%|25%|30%|40%} more damage to bosses.

skills.name: Dummy Decoy
skills.depths_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking fires a cursed projectile. When the projectile lands, it spawns a dummy decoy at that location with #{40|50|60|70|80|150} health that lasts for up to 10 seconds. The decoy aggros mobs within 8 blocks on a regular interval. On death, the decoy explodes, stunning mobs in a 4 block radius for #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|3} seconds. Cooldown: 22s.
skills.zenith_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking fires a cursed projectile. When the projectile lands, it spawns a dummy decoy at that location with #{60|75|90|105|120|225} health that lasts for up to 10 seconds. The decoy aggros mobs within 8 blocks on a regular interval. On death, the decoy explodes, stunning mobs in a 4 block radius for #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|3} seconds. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.name: Cloak of Shadows
skills.depths_description: Left click while sneaking to throw a shadow bomb, which explodes on landing, applying #{20%|25%|30%|35%|40%|50%} weaken for 6 seconds to mobs within 5 blocks. You enter stealth for #{1.5|1.75|2|2.25|2.5|3} seconds upon casting and the next instance of melee damage you deal within 4 seconds deals #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|100%} more damage multiplicatively. Cooldown: 15s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking to throw a shadow bomb, which explodes on landing, applying #{20%|25%|30%|35%|40%|50%} weaken for 6 seconds to mobs within 5 blocks. You enter stealth for #{1.5|1.75|2|2.25|2.5|3} seconds upon casting and the next instance of melee damage you deal within 4 seconds deals #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|100%} more damage multiplicatively. Cooldown: 15s.

skills.name: Shadow Slam
skills.depths_description: When you fall more than 3 blocks, landing causes a slam, dealing #{2|2.5|3|3.5|4|5.5} melee damage per block fallen in a 3 block radius. Falling more than 1.5 blocks and dealing a melee hit to an enemy also generates a slam and cancels fall damage.
skills.zenith_description: When you fall more than 3 blocks, landing causes a slam, dealing #{3|3.75|4.5|5.25|6|8.25} melee damage per block fallen in a 3 block radius. Falling more than 1.5 blocks and dealing a melee hit to an enemy also generates a slam and cancels fall damage.

skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.depths_description: When your health drops below 30%, ignore the hit and gain 50% resistance and stealth for #{3|4|5|6|7|10} seconds. Press key.drop within the next 3 seconds to throw a projectile that travels up to 14 blocks away. Upon hitting a mob, block, or reaching its max distance, you teleport to its location and leave behind a smoke bomb that stuns all mobs in a 5 block radius for #{1|1.5|2|2.5|3|4} seconds. Cooldown: 90s.
skills.zenith_description: When your health drops below 30%, ignore the hit and gain 50% resistance and stealth for #{3|4|5|6|7|10} seconds. Press key.drop within the next 3 seconds to throw a projectile that travels up to 14 blocks away. Upon hitting a mob, block, or reaching its max distance, you teleport to its location and leave behind a smoke bomb that stuns all mobs in a 5 block radius for #{1|1.5|2|2.5|3|4} seconds. Cooldown: 90s.

skills.name: Phantom Force
skills.depths_description: Killing an elite spawns #{2|2|2|2|2|3} vexes that hover near your enemies. Hitting them will detonate them, dealing #{6|7.5|9|10.5|12|15} melee damage in a 2 block radius and applies #{10%|13%|16%|19%|22%|28%} vulnerability for 4 seconds. Vexes last for 15 seconds and have a movement speed of 5 blocks per second. Cooldown: 5s.
skills.zenith_description: Killing an elite spawns #{2|2|2|2|2|3} vexes that hover near your enemies. Hitting them will detonate them, dealing #{9|11.25|13.5|15.75|18|22.5} melee damage in a 2 block radius and applies #{10%|13%|16%|19%|22%|28%} vulnerability for 4 seconds. Vexes last for 15 seconds and have a movement speed of 5 blocks per second. Cooldown: 5s.

trees.description: Master of ranged abilities with dual AOE and single target damage capabilities.

skills.name: Firework Blast
skills.depths_description: Right click while sneaking to shoot a firework that deals #{13|18|22|26|31|40} projectile damage to enemies within 5 blocks of its explosion. The damage is increased by 5% for every block the firework travels past 6 blocks, up to #{24|32|40|48|56|72} damage. Cooldown: 12s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while sneaking to shoot a firework that deals #{19.5|27|33|39|46.5|60} projectile damage to enemies within 5 blocks of its explosion. The damage is increased by 5% for every block the firework travels past 6 blocks, up to #{36|48|60|72|84|108} damage. Cooldown: 12s.

skills.name: Focused Combos
skills.depths_description: Every 3 critical projectile shots, deal #{30%|35%|40%|45%|50%|80%} more damage and apply 1 stack of Bleed.
skills.zenith_description: Every 3 critical projectile shots, deal #{30%|35%|40%|45%|50%|80%} more damage and apply 1 stack of Bleed.

skills.name: Gravity Bomb
skills.depths_description: Press key.swapOffhand to launch two flying bombs that arm after 0.75 seconds and explode after 8 seconds. Enemies near a bomb are afflicted with Slow Falling. Hitting a bomb with a projectile detonates it early, dealing #{18|22|26|30|34|42} projectile damage to all mobs in a 7 block radius and pulling them to the center of the explosion. Cooldown: 22s.
skills.zenith_description: Press key.swapOffhand to launch two flying bombs that arm after 0.75 seconds and explode after 8 seconds. Enemies near a bomb are afflicted with Slow Falling. Hitting a bomb with a projectile detonates it early, dealing #{27|33|39|45|51|63} projectile damage to all mobs in a 7 block radius and pulling them to the center of the explosion. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.name: Rapid Fire
skills.depths_description: Left click while Holding a Projectile Weapon to shoot a flurry of #{4|5|6|7|8|10} projectiles in the direction that you are looking that deal 10 projectile damage. Cooldown: 22s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while Holding a Projectile Weapon to shoot a flurry of #{4|5|6|7|8|10} projectiles in the direction that you are looking that deal 15 projectile damage. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.name: Scrapshot
skills.depths_description: Left click while sneaking to fire a blunderbuss shot that goes up to 8 blocks away, dealing #{35|43|52|59|68|85} projectile damage to the first mob and knocking you backwards. Damage is decreased based on distance if the distance is greater than 25% of the max range. The shot splits into shrapnel after hitting a mob and deals 33% of the initial damage dealt to all mobs in a 4 block cone behind the target. Cooldown: 10s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking to fire a blunderbuss shot that goes up to 8 blocks away, dealing #{52.5|64.5|78|88.5|102|127.5} projectile damage to the first mob and knocking you backwards. Damage is decreased based on distance if the distance is greater than 25% of the max range. The shot splits into shrapnel after hitting a mob and deals 33% of the initial damage dealt to all mobs in a 4 block cone behind the target. Cooldown: 10s.

skills.name: Sidearm
skills.depths_description: Right click while not sneaking to fire a flintlock shot, dealing #{15|18|21|24|27|33} projectile damage to the first mob hit and having a range of 14 blocks. If that kills a mob, this ability's cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds. Charges: 3. Sidearm's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time. Cooldown: 14s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking to fire a flintlock shot, dealing #{22.5|27|31.5|36|40.5|49.5} projectile damage to the first mob hit and having a range of 14 blocks. If that kills a mob, this ability's cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds. Charges: 3. Sidearm's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time. Cooldown: 14s.

skills.name: Steel Stallion
skills.depths_description: When your health drops below 25%, summon and ride a horse with #{50|60|70|80|90|110} health that disappears after #{10|11|12|13|14|18} seconds. While you are riding the horse, all damage you receive is redirected to the horse, including the damage that triggered this ability. The horse has a speed of #{0.2|0.24|0.28|0.32|0.36|0.44} and a jump strength of #{0.5|0.6|0.7|0.8|0.9|1.3}. Cooldown: 90s.
skills.zenith_description: When your health drops below 25%, summon and ride a horse with #{75|90|105|120|135|165} health that disappears after #{10|11|12|13|14|18} seconds. While you are riding the horse, all damage you receive is redirected to the horse, including the damage that triggered this ability. The horse has a speed of #{0.2|0.24|0.28|0.32|0.36|0.44} and a jump strength of #{0.5|0.6|0.7|0.8|0.9|1.3}. Cooldown: 90s.

skills.name: Sharpshooter
skills.depths_description: You deal #{10%|15%|20%|25%|30%|40%} more projectile damage. Each enemy hit with a critical projectile gives you a stack of Sharpshooter, up to 8. Stacks decay after #{4|4|4|4|4|6} seconds of not gaining a stack. Each stack increases your projectile damage by #{3%|4.25%|5.5%|6.75%|8%|10.5%}.
skills.zenith_description: You deal #{10%|15%|20%|25%|30%|40%} more projectile damage. Each enemy hit with a critical projectile gives you a stack of Sharpshooter, up to 8. Stacks decay after #{4|4|4|4|4|6} seconds of not gaining a stack. Each stack increases your projectile damage by #{3%|4.25%|5.5%|6.75%|8%|10.5%}.

skills.name: Split Arrow
skills.depths_description: When you shoot an enemy with a projectile, the nearest enemy within 5 blocks takes #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|100%} of the projectile's damage.
skills.zenith_description: When you shoot an enemy with a projectile, the nearest enemy within 5 blocks takes #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|100%} of the projectile's damage.

skills.name: Volley
skills.depths_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking shoots a volley consisting of #{7|9|11|13|15|18} projectiles instead. Only one arrow is consumed, and each projectile deals #{80%|105%|130%|155%|180%|230%} more damage. Cooldown: 15s.
skills.zenith_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking shoots a volley consisting of #{7|9|11|13|15|18} projectiles instead. Only one arrow is consumed, and each projectile deals #{80%|105%|130%|155%|180%|230%} more damage. Cooldown: 15s.

trees.description: An arsenal of movement abilities and crowd control, allowing precise maneuvers and quick escapes.

skills.name: Aeroblast
skills.depths_description: Right click while sneaking to blow a front-facing gust of wind, dealing #{10|12|14|16|18|22} magic damage to all mobs up to 4 blocks away, and knocking back all non-boss enemies. Deal an additional #{10|12|14|16|18|22} magic damage if enemies hit by this ability collide with a wall within 0.75 seconds. Additionally, casting this ability grants you 20% speed for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 6s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while sneaking to blow a front-facing gust of wind, dealing #{15|18|21|24|27|33} magic damage to all mobs up to 4 blocks away, and knocking back all non-boss enemies. Deal an additional #{15|18|21|24|27|33} magic damage if enemies hit by this ability collide with a wall within 0.75 seconds. Additionally, casting this ability grants you 20% speed for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 6s.

skills.name: Aeromancy
skills.depths_description: You deal #{12%|16%|20%|24%|28%|36%} more damage while airborne and #{6%|8%|10%|12%|14%|18%} more damage to airborne enemies.
skills.zenith_description: You deal #{12%|16%|20%|24%|28%|36%} more damage while airborne and #{6%|8%|10%|12%|14%|18%} more damage to airborne enemies.

skills.name: Dodging
skills.depths_description: You dodge the next projectile or potion attack that would have hit you, nullifying the damage. Cooldown: #{17|15|13|11|9|6}s.
skills.zenith_description: You dodge the next projectile or potion attack that would have hit you, nullifying the damage. Cooldown: #{17|15|13|11|9|6}s.

skills.name: Guarding Bolt
skills.depths_description: Left click while sneaking and  looking at a player  within 25 blocks to dash to their location. Mobs within 4 blocks of the destination are dealt #{15|18|21|24|27|35} magic damage, knocked back, and stunned for #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|2.5} seconds. Cooldown: 20s.
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking and  looking at a player or grave within 25 blocks to dash to their location. Mobs within 4 blocks of the destination are dealt #{22.5|27|31.5|36|40.5|52.5} magic damage, knocked back, and stunned for #{1|1.25|1.5|1.75|2|2.5} seconds. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.name: Thundercloud Form
skills.depths_description: Press key.swapOffhand to launch upwards, dealing #{8|11|14|17|20|26} magic damage to mobs within 4 blocks and knocking them away, and enter flight for 4 seconds. While in flight, trigger again to throw a bolt of lightning that deals #{60|70|80|90|100|120} magic damage to the first enemy it strikes and #{20|25|30|35|40|50} magic damage to all other enemies in a 4 block radius. Cooldown: 30s.
skills.zenith_description: Press key.swapOffhand to launch upwards, dealing #{12|16.5|21|25.5|30|39} magic damage to mobs within 4 blocks and knocking them away, and enter flight for 4 seconds. While in flight, trigger again to throw a bolt of lightning that deals #{90|105|120|135|150|180} magic damage to the first enemy it strikes and #{30|37.5|45|52.5|60|75} magic damage to all other enemies in a 4 block radius. Cooldown: 30s.

skills.name: Last Breath
skills.depths_description: When your health drops below 40%, all your other Windwalker abilities' cooldowns are reset, and abilities from other trees have their cooldowns reduced by #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|100%}. You gain #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|35%} speed for 6 seconds and 100% resistance for #{1.5|1.75|2|2.25|2.5|3.5} seconds. Mobs within 5 blocks are knocked away. Cooldown: 60s.
skills.zenith_description: When your health drops below 40%, all your other Windwalker abilities' cooldowns are reset, and abilities from other trees have their cooldowns reduced by #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|100%}. You gain #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|35%} speed for 6 seconds and 100% resistance for #{1.5|1.75|2|2.25|2.5|3.5} seconds. Mobs within 5 blocks are knocked away. Cooldown: 60s.

skills.name: One with the Wind
skills.depths_description: If there are no other players in a 10 block radius, you gain #{8%|10%|12%|14%|16%|20%} resistance and #{16%|20%|24%|28%|32%|40%} speed.
skills.zenith_description: If there are no other players in a 10 block radius, you gain #{8%|10%|12%|14%|16%|20%} resistance and #{16%|20%|24%|28%|32%|40%} speed.

skills.name: Restoring Draft
skills.depths_description: Falling more than 4 blocks heals you by #{0.1|0.15|0.2|0.25|0.3|0.75} health per block fallen (up to 12 blocks). All fall damage is canceled.
skills.zenith_description: Falling more than 4 blocks heals you by #{0.1|0.15|0.2|0.25|0.3|0.75} health per block fallen (up to 12 blocks). All fall damage is canceled.

skills.name: Skyhook
skills.depths_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking shoots out a skyhook. When the skyhook lands, you dash to the location and reduce all other ability cooldowns by 1% per block traveled, up to a maximum of 5 seconds. Cooldown: #{16|14|12|10|8|4}s.
skills.zenith_description: Shooting a projectile while sneaking shoots out a skyhook. When the skyhook lands, you dash to the location and reduce all other ability cooldowns by 1% per block traveled, up to a maximum of 5 seconds. Cooldown: #{16|14|12|10|8|4}s.

skills.name: Wind Walk
skills.depths_description: Right click while not sneaking to dash in the target direction, applying #{15%|17.5%|20%|22.5%|25%|40%} vulnerability for 5 seconds, Levitation I for 2 seconds, and stun for 1.5 seconds to all non-Boss enemies dashed through. Gain immunity to melee damage for 0.5s when triggered. Cooldown: #{14|13|12|11|10|8}s.
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking to dash in the target direction, applying #{15%|17.5%|20%|22.5%|25%|40%} vulnerability for 5 seconds, Levitation I for 2 seconds, and stun for 1.5 seconds to all non-Boss enemies dashed through. Gain immunity to melee damage for 0.5s when triggered. Cooldown: #{14|13|12|11|10|8}s.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.depths_description: Being airborne for 0.75 seconds will reduce your next casted ability's cooldown by #{5%|7.5%|10%|12.5%|15%|20%}. Additionally, you receive #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|30%} speed for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 15s.
skills.zenith_description: Being airborne for 0.75 seconds will reduce your next casted ability's cooldown by #{5%|7.5%|10%|12.5%|15%|20%}. Additionally, you receive #{10%|12.5%|15%|17.5%|20%|30%} speed for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 15s.

skills.name: Windswept Combos
skills.depths_description: Every 3 melee strikes, gain #{5%|7.5%|10%|12.5%|15%|20%} cooldown reduction for your abilities (max 5s) and pull nearby mobs inwards in a 4 block radius.
skills.zenith_description: Every 3 melee strikes, gain #{5%|7.5%|10%|12.5%|15%|20%} cooldown reduction for your abilities (max 5s) and pull nearby mobs inwards in a 4 block radius.

skills.name: Abnormality
skills.zenith_description: Gain a random ability at Twisted rarity, a selection of Prismatic abilities at #{Common|Uncommon|Rare|Epic|Legendary|Twisted} rarity, a selection of Zenith Curse abilities, and 1 reroll. Remove this ability

skills.name: Encore
skills.zenith_description: Left click while sneaking to cause the next active ability you cast to be recast at no cooldown cost 5 seconds later. Cooldown: #{26|24|22|20|18|14}s.

skills.name: Disco Ball
skills.zenith_description: Fire a projectile weapon while sneaking to summon a spinning Disco Ball above where your projectile lands. The ball lasts 5 seconds, and rains #{5.25|6.75|8.25|9.75|11.25|14.25} magic damage onto 3 targets every 0.5 seconds. The disco ball starts out with a narrow targeting angle and expands over time. If your party has an active trigger ability from all eight trees, the final pulse of the ball will heat up the dance floor with a color show that deals quadruple damage. Cooldown: 18s.

skills.name: Generosity
skills.zenith_description: Once per floor, removing or mutating away an ability gifts it to all other teammates, provided they have an open slot for it. The donated ability's level will be #{Common|Uncommon|Rare|Epic|Legendary|Twisted}.

skills.name: Charity
skills.zenith_description: You revive players #{40%|50%|60%|70%|80%|100%} faster. After you help revive a player, both you and the revived player gain #{4|5|6|7|8|10} absorption health for 10 seconds.

skills.name: Solar Ray
skills.zenith_description: Right click while not sneaking to summon a beam of radiant energy which travels in a straight line for 4 seconds, and bounces off of surfaces. The beam deals #{18|21|24|27|30|36} magic damage when it comes into contact with a mob. The same mob can be hit one time per bounce, and up to 2 times in total. Killing unique mobs with this ability permanently increases its damage by 0.33. Cooldown: 9s.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.zenith_description: You can now hold up to #{2|3|4|5|6|7} wildcard abilities.

skills.name: Flexibility
skills.zenith_description: Gain #{1.5%|2.5%|3.5%|4.5%|5.5%|7.5%} damage for each unique tree featured in your active ability slots.

skills.name: Multiplicity
skills.zenith_description: After casting 3 abilities from different trees in a row, refund #{30%|35%|40%|45%|50%|60%} of those abilities' cooldowns and gain #{12%|15%|18%|21%|24%|30%} melee damage for 5 seconds.

skills.name: Prosperity
skills.zenith_description: Gain a #{25%|45%|65%|85%|100%|150%} chance to get an extra option in ability and upgrade rewards.

skills.name: Refraction
skills.zenith_description:
Press key.swapOffhand to begin charging a powerful beam in the direction you face. After a 1 second windup, it releases a beam of prismatic energy that deals #{31.5|36|40.5|45|49.5|58.5} magic damage per second for 3.5 seconds. Triggering again while active will cause the beam to remain in place for the remainder of the duration. Additionally, the beam will apply status effects to allies and enemies depending on your available trees. Cooldown: 20s.
Frostborn - Apply 10% Slow for 3 seconds to mobs hit by the beam.
Flamecaller - Apply Fire for 3 seconds to mobs hit by the beam.
Dawnbringer - Apply a 5% Max HP Heal to players hit by the beam.
Earthbound - Apply 10% Resistance for 10 seconds to players hit by the beam.
Shadowdancer - Apply 10% Vulnerability for 3 seconds to mobs hit by the beam.
Steelsage - Apply 1 stack of Bleed to mobs hit by the beam.
Windwalker - Apply 10% Speed for 10 seconds to players hit by the beam.

skills.name: Rebirth
skills.zenith_description: When you would permanently die, you are reborn, gaining 100% Resistance for 10 seconds and refunding the revive duration lost from that death. When this happens, all of your abilities are replaced with random new abilities in the same slot from any tree, including Prismatic. These abilities are upgraded by 2 levels. In addition, gain #{0|1|2|3|4|6} more random abilities.

skills.name: Color Splash
skills.zenith_description:
Press key.swapOffhand to cast a unique ability after 1s. This ability cycles through your available trees in the order you have them. Cooldown: 30s.
Frostborn - For 10s, leave a trail of snow behind you. Mobs within 15 blocks of you will take #{12|15|18|21|24|30} magic damage every 0.5s while standing on frozen ground.
Flamecaller - For 10s, summon a meteor shower at the location where you are looking, dealing #{6|7.5|9|10.5|12|15} magic damage to mobs within 2.5 blocks upon impact.
Dawnbringer - For 10s, become a beacon of light, healing all players in a cone in front of you for #{4|5|6|7|8|10} health, every 1s. Extra healing will be converted to absorption, up to 10 health, which lasts for 8s. Additionally, you can revive teammates from 2 blocks further away than normal.
Earthbound - For 10s, gain #{20%|24%|28%|32%|36%|44%} resistance, and taunt enemies within 8 blocks of you every 1s. Additionally, if you drop below 40% health, disable this effect and stun nearby mobs for 3s.
Shadowdancer - For 10s, enter stealth every 1s. The next instance of damage done while in stealth will deal #{12%|14%|16%|18%|20%|24%} more damage and will put you out of stealth.
Steelsage - For 10s, ride an invincible horse. While on the horse, any melee damage you would take is negated, and you deal #{20%|24%|28%|32%|36%|44%} more projectile damage. Trigger again while active to dismount.
Windwalker - For 10s, gain #{20%|24%|28%|32%|36%|44%} speed. Additionally, every time you trigger again, you initiate a Wind Walk, gaining 0.5s of Invincibility Frames, launching yourself, applying levitation and 20% vulnerability, and stunning non-Boss mobs hit for 1.5s. This secondary effect has a cooldown of 0.6s, which starts counting down from the moment the Wind Walk ends.

skills.name: Diversity
skills.zenith_description: After you possess abilities from six unique trees, gain #{10%|12%|14%|16%|18%|22%} speed permanently, and your chances of finding better abilities are increased by #{8%|10%|12%|14%|16%|20%}. The first time you reach this goal, you will receive a selection of other Prismatics.

skills.name: Chroma Blade
skills.zenith_description:
Right click while sneaking to unleash two slashes that each deal #{22.5|25.5|28.5|31.5|34.5|40.5} melee damage. If your weapon's attack speed is below 1.3, perform slower, wider slashes with 25% increased cooldown instead. Additionally, gain a bonus effect depending on the tree of the last ability you used. Cooldown: 12s.
Frostborn - Replace the second slash with a shockwave that creates ice and applies 20% Slow for 8s.
Flamecaller - Increase the size of both slashes by 75% and ignite mobs hit for 8s.
Dawnbringer - Mobs hit by a slash drop a piece of Chroma that when picked up, grants 1 absorption health, up to 6, for 10s.
Earthbound - Replace the second slash with an earthquake that pulls, taunts, and applies 20% Weaken to mobs for 8s.
Shadowdancer - Silence mobs hit for 1s. If the slash brings a non-Boss mob under 20% HP, they die instantly.
Steelsage - If a slash doesn't hit any mobs, it continues forward as a projectile.
Windwalker - Additionally dash forwards while slashing. Each slash reduces your skill cooldowns by 1.5s if it hits a mob.
Prismatic - Add a third cross-slash that is 50% larger and deals 65% more damage.

skills.name: Opportunity
skills.zenith_description: Gain #{1|1|2|3|4|6} rerolls.

skills.name: Curse of Anchoring
skills.zenith_description: Your Swap trigger is permanently locked.

skills.name: Curse of Arachnophobia
skills.zenith_description: Deal 50% less to and take 50% more damage from spiders of all sizes.

skills.name: Curse of Chaos
skills.zenith_description: The chaos utility room's effect is applied to you every 3 rooms.

skills.name: Curse of Death
skills.zenith_description: Your grave revive timer is reduced by 2 deaths' worth.

skills.name: Curse of Dependency
skills.zenith_description: Self-healing is 65% as effective. Healing from other players is unaffected.

skills.name: Curse of Envy
skills.zenith_description: Your trees are inverted.

skills.name: Curse of Gluttony
skills.zenith_description: Lose your 2 highest rarity abilities (up to Legendary).

skills.name: Curse of Greed
skills.zenith_description: Lose 5% max health for each ability you have at Legendary rarity or higher.

skills.name: Curse of Impatience
skills.zenith_description: After casting an ability, all other abilities' cooldowns are increased by 1s.

skills.name: Curse of Lust
skills.zenith_description: Deal 8% less damage for each block above 7 blocks away your closest teammate is, up to 80% reduced damage.

skills.name: Curse of Obscurity
skills.zenith_description: One of your ability or upgrade choices is hidden.

skills.name: Curse of Pessimism
skills.zenith_description: While any other member of your party is below 50% health, you cannot heal above 50% health or gain absorption.

skills.name: Curse of Pride
skills.zenith_description: Unlock all trees. Having more than 4 abilities from one tree makes you take 10% more damage per ability.

skills.name: Curse of Redundancy
skills.zenith_description: After casting 2 abilities from the same tree in a row, all of your abilities' cooldowns recharge 50% slower for 5 seconds.

skills.name: Curse of Ruin
skills.zenith_description: When you select an ability or upgrade, downgrade a random ability by 1 level.

skills.name: Curse of Sloth
skills.zenith_description: Lose 15% speed. You cannot gain any positive speed effects.

skills.name: Curse of Sobriety
skills.zenith_description: All positive potion effects are nullified.

skills.name: Twisted Scroll
skills.zenith_description: Select an ability to upgrade to Twisted level.

skills.name: Forsaken Grimoire
skills.zenith_description: Select an active ability from your trees and obtain it at Rare rarity.

skills.name: Prismatic Cube
skills.zenith_description: Replace an active ability with a Prismatic ability.

skills.name: Northern Star
skills.zenith_description: The next 4 elite rooms offer an additional reward.

skills.name: Bottomless Bowl
skills.zenith_description: You now have the choice to skip room rewards; doing so will grant you +5% healing and damage dealt.

skills.name: Poet's Quill
skills.zenith_description: Remove a tree (but not any abilities) and replace it with another tree of your choice.

skills.name: Purging Stone
skills.zenith_description: Downgrade all abilities by one level and remove a random curse.

skills.name: Wild Card
skills.zenith_description: Every time you enter a Wildcard room, upgrade a random ability by one level.

skills.name: Avaricious Pendant
skills.zenith_description: Every time you conquer an elite room or boss, gain one treasure score.

skills.name: Celestial Surprise
skills.zenith_description: Gain two celestial gifts at random.

skills.name: Comb of Selection
skills.zenith_description: Each time you spend a reroll on an ability selection, the new set of abilities is upgraded by one level. Gain two rerolls.

skills.name: Pillar of Light
skills.zenith_description: The radius in which you can revive teammates triples.

skills.name: Broken Clock
skills.zenith_description: Gain nothing now. If you defeat the next boss, gain three celestial gift selections instead of one.

skills.name: Treasure Map
skills.zenith_description: Once your team selects one of each room type, gain 2 Prismatic ability selections.

skills.name: Mega Hammer
skills.zenith_description: Any Common or Uncommon abilities you have are upgraded to Epic level.

skills.name: Kaleidoscopic Lens
skills.zenith_description: Lose your current trees. Gain the trees you didn't have previously, and a Prismatic ability selection.

skills.name: Callicarpa's Pointed Hat
skills.zenith_description: Pick an active tree. For the next three ability selections, you will only find abilities from that tree.

skills.name: Venom of the Broodmother
skills.zenith_description: Restore your grave timer to the maximum.

skills.name: Broodmother's Webbing
skills.zenith_description: Select another player to receive a protective webbing. The next time they die, their negative effects are cleansed and they are healed to full health.

skills.name: Statue of Regret
skills.zenith_description: Choose one of your current curses to replace with a selection of five other curses.

skills.name: Rainbow Geode
skills.zenith_description: You now have the choice to skip room rewards. Gain a Prismatic ability selection every time you skip three rewards.

skills.name: Cracked Idol
skills.zenith_description: Gain +10% damage, resistance, speed, and ability rarity odds. The next time you die, permanently lose these effects.

skills.name: Orb of Darkness
skills.zenith_description: Lose all of your Prismatic abilities. For every ability lost, gain two Twisted upgrades.

skills.name: Aspect of the Axe
skills.depths_description: You deal 1 extra melee damage and gain 15% attack speed when holding an axe.
skills.zenith_description: You deal 1 extra melee damage and gain 15% attack speed when holding an axe.

skills.name: Mystery Box
skills.depths_description: Obtain a random ability. Transforms into a random other aspect after defeating floor 3.
skills.zenith_description: Obtain a random ability at Twisted level.

skills.name: Aspect of the Scythe
skills.depths_description: While holding a scythe, you gain an independent level of life drain and 5% damage reduction.
skills.zenith_description: While holding a scythe, you gain an independent level of life drain and 5% damage reduction.

skills.name: Aspect of the Sword
skills.depths_description: You deal 3 extra melee damage when holding a sword.
skills.zenith_description: You deal 3 extra melee damage when holding a sword.

skills.name: Aspect of the Wand
skills.depths_description: You deal 1 extra melee damage while holding a wand, and magic damage is increased by 35% of the wand's Spell Power.
skills.zenith_description: You deal 1 extra melee damage while holding a wand, and magic damage is increased by 35% of the wand's Spell Power.

skills.name: Aspect of the Bow
skills.depths_description: Your sneak fire with bow ability has 25% reduced cooldown, and you have a 50% chance for arrows to not be consumed when using a bow or crossbow.
skills.zenith_description: Your sneak fire with bow ability has 25% reduced cooldown, and you have a 50% chance for arrows to not be consumed when using a bow or crossbow.
